items.content: Researched sustainable fabric suppliers in Ghana for the new collection, focusing on organic cotton and recycled materials. Found a promising contact in Kumasi.
Had a video call with the Zuri Lagos Instagram manager to discuss strategies for increasing engagement before the holiday season. Agreed to run a user-generated content campaign.
Asked for a translation of a complex digital pattern-making tutorial from French to English. The AI provided a clear and accurate translation, saving me hours of manual work.
Discussed potential collaborations with a popular modest fashion influencer based in Dubai. The AI helped draft talking points and research her audience demographics.
Attended a Nollywood premiere with friends. Enjoyed the film immensely and discussed the costume design afterwards.
Mentored a group of young seamstresses, teaching them basic digital pattern-making techniques. Their enthusiasm was inspiring.
Brainstormed ideas for the next Zuri Lagos pop-up event. Explored themes around 'Modern Heritage' and incorporating traditional Nigerian motifs.
Asked the AI for advice on managing stress during busy design periods. It suggested mindfulness exercises and time-blocking techniques.
Received positive feedback from a customer in the UK who loved the modest yet expressive design of a recently purchased abaya. Their message made my day.
Planned a trip to visit family in Abuja for Eid. Asked the AI to research flight options and potential modest accommodations.
